title: Shock collar
description: Addon datapack to the Leashable Collar mod that turns it into a shock collar and add more controls
body:
## Overview
- Adds a new item called "Shock remote" that allows fine tuning of collars and, well, shocking.
- Throw a bell, clicker and lightning rod on the ground to craft it.
## How to use
- Right click in mainhand to shock(will not kill or damage armor)
- Rightclick in mainhand while sneaking to switch leashing distances (follow mode gives step height, prevents getting stuck on terrain)
- Hold in offhand to shock automatically
- Hold in offhand while sneaking to recall player to a nearby armor stand
## Notes
- Ownership not implemented yet, this will affect every single players wearing a collar.
- You can suggest features/ports and report bugs in the discord.
